description: UserSidebar links to unified properties browse page
steps: Verify UserSidebar has a 'Browse Properties' link pointing to /properties
Verify UserSidebar does NOT have a 'Browse Flats' link pointing to /flats

description: CompanySidebar includes Properties and Analytics links
steps: Verify CompanySidebar has a 'Properties' link pointing to /company/properties
Verify CompanySidebar has an 'Analytics' link pointing to /company/analytics

description: ContractorSidebar uses Projects instead of Buildings
steps: Verify ContractorSidebar has a 'Projects' link pointing to /contractor/projects
Verify ContractorSidebar does NOT have a 'My Buildings' link pointing to /contractor/buildings
Verify Navbar shows 'Browse Properties' link for all users
Verify Navbar shows 'Properties' and 'Analytics' links for company role
Verify Navbar shows 'Projects' link for contractor role

description: MobileMenu has updated navigation links for all roles
steps: Verify MobileMenu includes company section with Properties and Analytics
Verify MobileMenu includes contractor section with Projects link
